description:
~Alter Identity SDK - query the continuous identity field from any JavaScript/TypeScript environment.

Verify whether a person is known to ~Alter, query psychometric trait vectors, compute belonging probability for a person-org pairing, and resolve ~handles to canonical form. Every premium call settles via x402 micropayments on Base L2 (USDC); 75% of each settled call flows to the member as Identity Income, your identity earns. ~Alter receives only its protocol cut. No custodian, no broker.

Anonymous callers get L0 free tools. Authenticated agents register via `alter login` and access L1-L5 via x402, with per-call pricing visible after sign-in. Member credentials are scoped to the caller's own data on all strict tools.

37 publicly advertised tools (28 free, 9 premium L1-L5) across identity, assessment, matching, graph, and trust. Streamable-HTTP MCP transport at https://mcp.truealter.com/api/v1/mcp. Apache-2.0 SDK.
